home.title: Acentigo | Travel Agency & Tour Sales Software
home.description: Cloud tour management, online bookings, Stripe-ready payments, accounting, and reporting—built for modern travel agencies and DMCs.
home.keywords: travel agency software, tour operator platform, reservation system, Stripe payments, travel CRM, DMC software, tour booking system

features.title: Product Features | Acentigo Travel Agency Platform
features.description: Tour inventory, reservations, Stripe payment workflows, hotel modules, accounting, customer CRM, transfers, and mobile-ready booking—explore Acentigo capabilities.
features.keywords: tour management features, travel booking software, Stripe integration, agency accounting, hotel module

about.title: About Acentigo | Travel Technology Company
about.description: We help travel agencies digitize operations with secure, scalable software—mission, vision, and values behind the Acentigo platform.
about.keywords: about Acentigo, travel technology, agency digital transformation

contact.title: Contact & Demo | Acentigo
contact.description: Request a demo or talk to our team about Acentigo for your travel agency. Enterprise-grade onboarding and support.
contact.keywords: Acentigo demo, travel software contact, agency software sales

technology.title: Infrastructure & Security | Acentigo
technology.description: Cloud-native architecture, global CDN, autoscaling, TLS encryption, and high availability for mission-critical travel operations.
technology.keywords: cloud travel software, CDN, uptime, security, TLS

footer.tagline: Professional tour sales and agency operations software.
footer.sub: Digitize operations, improve margins, and scale with a single platform.

hero.description: Manage tours, bookings, Stripe-powered payments, invoicing, and accounting in one secure, intuitive system—optimized for teams that outgrow spreadsheets.

featuresGrid.heading: Complete
featuresGrid.sub: Everything your agency needs—modern UX, robust APIs, and workflows designed for real tour operations.

items.title: Tour management
items.description: Itineraries, departures, pricing tiers (adult, child, infant), capacity controls, and channel-ready inventory.

items.title: Reservations
items.description: Branded booking flows, passenger data, age validation, waitlists, and real-time availability.

items.title: Payments (Stripe-ready)
items.description: Card payments via Stripe, settlement tracking, deposits and balances, and automated invoice workflows aligned with PCI best practices.

items.title: Hotels & rooms
items.description: Property profiles, room types, allotments, and packaging with tours for seamless FIT and group programs.

items.title: Accounting & BI
items.description: Sales analytics, commission ledgers, P&L views, cash positions, and export-ready reporting for finance teams.

items.title: Customer CRM
items.description: 360° traveler profiles, booking history, consent-aware communications, and segmentation for campaigns.

items.title: Transfers & fleet
items.description: Route-based transfers, vehicle classes, dynamic pricing, and operational manifests for ground partners.

items.title: Mobile-first
items.description: Responsive console and guest journeys—your team and customers work from any device.

howItWorks.heading: How it
howItWorks.sub: Launch faster with a guided rollout—no rip-and-replace drama.

steps.title: Onboard your agency
steps.description: Provision workspaces, roles, and branding. Optional sandbox to train staff before go-live.

steps.title: Publish inventory
steps.description: Load tours, hotels, and policies. Connect Stripe for live or test payments when you are ready.

steps.title: Capture bookings
steps.description: Guests book online; confirmations, documents, and payment schedules sync automatically.

steps.title: Operate & optimize
steps.description: Manage operations, reconcile payouts, and steer growth with dashboards your leadership team can trust.

benefits.heading: Why
benefits.sub: Enterprise discipline with the speed of a modern SaaS product.

items.title: Fast to adopt
items.description: Guided implementation, sensible defaults, and UX your team understands on day one—without custom dev projects.

items.title: Security-first
items.description: Encryption in transit and at rest, least-privilege access, audit-friendly logs, and resilient backups.

items.title: Scales with you
items.description: From boutique agencies to multi-branch operators—capacity, locales, and workflows grow with demand.

items.title: Predictable economics
items.description: Transparent pricing without surprise infrastructure bills—focus budget on growth, not undifferentiated IT.

cta.description: See Acentigo in action. We will tailor the walkthrough to your agency model, markets, and payment stack—including Stripe.

aboutPage.title: About Acentigo
aboutPage.intro: We build operations software for travel sellers who need reliability, clarity, and speed—without compromising guest experience.
aboutPage.missionBody: Empower agencies and tour operators with a unified platform that replaces fragmented tools, reduces manual work, and improves financial control.
aboutPage.visionBody: Become the trusted operating system for travel distribution teams across regions—bridging commercial, operations, and finance on one ledger of truth.

values.title: Trust
values.desc: Data integrity, transparent SLAs, and honest roadmaps—not vaporware.

values.title: Innovation
values.desc: Continuous delivery of features that map to how agencies really work.

values.title: Customer success
values.desc: Implementation playbooks and responsive support tied to outcomes.

values.title: Simplicity
values.desc: Powerful under the hood, calm on the surface—fewer clicks, fewer errors.

aboutPage.whyBody: Deep workflows for tours and packages, Stripe-aligned payments, and reporting finance teams actually use—backed by infrastructure tuned for uptime.

technologyPage.title: Technology
technologyPage.intro: Acentigo runs on a cloud-native stack engineered for low latency, elastic scale, and defense-in-depth security.
technologyPage.visualBody: Like the experience we deliver—our platform adapts to traffic spikes, new markets, and evolving compliance expectations without drama.

features.title: Cloud-native
features.description: No on-prem servers to patch—always on the latest hardened runtime.

features.title: Global CDN
features.description: Edge-cached assets and APIs closer to your customers worldwide.

features.title: Low latency
features.description: Optimized queries, caching, and streaming UI patterns for snappy consoles.

features.title: Autoscaling
features.description: Capacity follows demand—peak season, campaigns, or viral offers.

features.title: High availability
features.description: Architected for resilient paths, health checks, and graceful degradation.

features.title: Security posture
features.description: TLS, DDoS mitigation layers, and privacy-aware data handling aligned to modern expectations.

technologyPage.statsNote: *Depends on region and workload; measured on reference deployments.

featuresPage.title: Features
featuresPage.intro: Acentigo unifies commercial, operational, and financial workflows so your agency runs on one source of truth.

items.title: Product authoring
items.description: Rich itineraries, media galleries, policies, and merchandising controls.

items.title: Pricing & departures
items.description: Adult, child, infant tiers; early-bird rules; blackout dates; channel-specific price lists.

items.title: Capacity governance
items.description: Min/max party sizes, allotments, overbooking guards, and waitlist automation.

items.title: Online booking
items.description: Fast, mobile-first flows with localized content and secure checkout handoff.

items.title: Age & eligibility rules
items.description: Automatic age calculations and policy enforcement at quote and confirmation.

items.title: Lifecycle statuses
items.description: Pending, confirmed, cancelled, no-show—full audit trail per booking.

items.title: Stripe integration
items.description: Card capture, refunds, and reconciliation mapped to bookings—in a Stripe-aligned, PCI-conscious workflow.

items.title: Invoices & documents
items.description: Branded invoices, payment schedules, and export for accounting systems.

items.title: Receivables tracking
items.description: Aging, partial payments, deposits, and automated reminders.

items.title: Property catalog
items.description: Room types, rate plans, media, and contract terms in one library.

items.title: Availability & holds
items.description: Room-level availability with tour packaging and group blocks.

items.title: Unified operations
items.description: Link hotel stays to passenger manifests and transfer schedules.

items.title: Sales intelligence
items.description: Period comparisons, product mix, channel contribution, and cohort views.

items.title: Commissions
items.description: Partner splits, accruals, and payout batches with approval trails.

items.title: Financial statements
items.description: Revenue recognition helpers, expense tagging, and management reporting packs.

items.title: Agency ledger
items.description: Central journal of operational and financial events for auditors and CFOs.

items.title: Profiles & history
items.description: Passenger records, documents, preferences, and lifetime value signals.

items.title: Segmentation
items.description: Lists for campaigns, negotiated rates, and partner-specific offers.

items.title: Communications
items.description: Email/SMS hooks with templates for confirmations, changes, and reminders.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.intro: Request a tailored demo or ask a technical question—we respond within one business day in most regions.
contactPage.success: Thank you—we received your request and will reach out shortly.
contactPage.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

fields.name: Full name
